title: Bivonaea abulensis
taxonomy: Bivonaea abulensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is endemic to the Canary Islands, specifically to the island of La Palma. The plant is classified as a succulent, belonging to the genus Bivonaea. Its classification is further detailed by its family, order, and kingdom. Bivonaea abulensis is classified as Aizoaceae family, Caryophyllales order, and Plantae kingdom.
